title: Imperial Enclave
content:
{{Top|leg}}
[[File:KileII.png|thumb|250px|The Imperial Enclave on [[Kile II]].]]

An '''Imperial Enclave''' was a major multi-purpose [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Imperial]] facility. It could include training grounds, communication arrays, staging areas, and spaceports. They also controlled the outlying systems.

==Known Imperial Enclaves==
*[[Kile II]] (destroyed by [[Rogue Squadron/Legends|Rogue Squadron]] in [[1 ABY/Legends|1 ABY]])
*[[Cadavine Sector Fleet Imperial Enclave]] on [[Gall/Legends|Gall]]
*[[Carida/Legends|Carida]] (destroyed by the [[Sun Crusher]])
*[[Prefsbelt IV/Legends|Prefsbelt IV]]
*[[Karideph]]

==Appearances==
*''[[Star Wars: Rogue Squadron II: Rogue Leader]]''
*[[Star Wars: Rogue Squadron (video game)|''Star Wars: Rogue Squadron'']]
*[[Shadows of the Empire 1|''Shadows of the Empire'' 1]]
*[[Star Wars: Shadows of the Empire (abridged audiobook)|''Star Wars: Shadows of the Empire'' abridged audiobook]]
*[[Star Wars: Shadows of the Empire (junior novelization)|''Star Wars: Shadows of the Empire'' junior novelization]]
*[[Shadows of the Empire 2|''Shadows of the Empire'' 2]]
*''[[Champions of the Force]]''
